subject: Ops note: urban takeover deployment schedule for Auckland | Frida Kahlo | Q4 review | INIT-3549
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in Auckland. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Frida Kahlo and Nikola Tesla as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-3549. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: readiness, delivery.
